last_planning_summary: Task 173 is locking the v0.5 roadmap after v0.4.0 post-release verification, ni-grill dogfood, roadmap/distribution alignment, and benchmark evidence expansion. CAP-019 records v0.5 as evidence, reliability, and adoption hardening: real benchmark evidence with visible not_measured boundaries, conversation-authoring reliability, ni-grill challenge quality, change-control UX, Homebrew as Planned / v0.5 candidate only, model workspace packs as Experimental unless host-level install is verified, no-terminal as assisted, product-surface expansion, and downstream integrations only as separate packages or seed formats. The current turn must use ni status, apply AMEND-015, relock through the CLI after explicit confirmation, and compile .ni/generated/v0.5-roadmap.prompt.txt without executing it.

recent_decisions.title: v0.5 roadmap lock follows evidence, reliability, and adoption hardening

recent_risks.title: v0.5 evidence, distribution, or workspace claims overreach

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
